DATABASE_URL.description: PostgreSQL connection URL (Railway PostgreSQL plugin provides this automatically)

REDIS_URL.description: Redis connection URL (Railway Redis plugin provides this automatically)

S3_BUCKET_NAME.description: S3 bucket for batch result ZIPs (leave blank for local /tmp fallback)

AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID.description: AWS IAM key with s3:PutObject and s3:GetObject permissions

STRIPE_PRICE_PRO.description: Stripe Price ID for Pro tier (price_...)

STRIPE_PRICE_ENTERPRISE.description: Stripe Price ID for Enterprise tier (price_...)

FRONTEND_URL.description: Frontend URL for Stripe Checkout redirects

VALID_API_KEYS.description: JSON dict of static API keys, e.g. {"key":"tier"}
